parameters.name: UV RMS Voltage
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase RMS Voltage measurement

parameters.name: VW RMS Voltage
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase RMS Voltage measurement

parameters.name: WU RMS Voltage
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase RMS Voltage measurement

parameters.name: UV Frequency
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase Frequency measurement

parameters.name: VW Frequency
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase Frequency measurement

parameters.name: WU Frequency
parameters.comment: Phase – Phase Frequency measurement

parameters.name: Field Current RMS
parameters.comment: Field Current RMS measurement

parameters.name: DROOP Current RMS
parameters.comment: DROOP Current RMS measurement by 1 PU

parameters.name: AUX Voltage Input Value
parameters.comment: Auxiliary voltage input measurement

parameters.name: AUX Current Input Value
parameters.comment: Auxiliary current input measurement

parameters.name: VOLTS Pot
parameters.comment: VOLTS Trimmer measurement. Percentage of the effect on the output voltage

parameters.name: STAB Pot
parameters.comment: STAB Trimmer measurement. Percentage of the effect on the PID parameters

parameters.name: DROOP Pot
parameters.comment: DROOP Trimmer measurement. Percentage of the effect on the output voltage

parameters.name: EXT Pot
parameters.comment: External pot measurement

parameters.name: EXT Pot Connected
parameters.comment: External pot connection status flag. Reference voltage would stay same in case of broken pot. It will return to reference voltage on restart if there is no pot connected.

parameters.name: Controller State
parameters.comment: AVR’s current status

parameters.name: Effective Reference Voltage
parameters.comment: Actual voltage reference that is AVR trying to reach. In relation with Onboard VOLTS pot external pot UFRO LAM DROOP

parameters.name: Calibration Ready
parameters.comment: Calibration status parameter. Check ‘Calibration Verification’ parameter to verify

parameters.name: Configuration Ready
parameters.comment: Configuration status parameter. Check ‘Calibration Verification’ parameter to verify

parameters.name: DAVR Ready
parameters.comment: AVR is ready to operate no latched errors

parameters.name: USB
parameters.comment: USB Connected

parameters.name: UFRO
parameters.comment: UFRO function is ongoing. detected Low Frequency

parameters.name: SHORT CIRCUIT
parameters.comment: Stator Current Measurement reached short circuit

parameters.name: RELAY
parameters.comment: Alarm Relay Activated

parameters.name: OUT TRIP
parameters.comment: AVR Output Cutoff

parameters.name: SCM
parameters.comment: Stator Current IDMT Activated

parameters.name: OEX
parameters.comment: Over Excitation Protection Activated

parameters.name: LOS
parameters.comment: Loss Of Sense Protection Activated

parameters.name: GOV
parameters.comment: Generator Over Voltage Protection Activated

parameters.name: GUV
parameters.comment: Generator Under Voltage Protection Activated

parameters.name: SVU
parameters.comment: Stator Voltage Unbalance Protection Activated

parameters.name: GCL
parameters.comment: Generator Current Limit Protection Activated

parameters.name: MSF
parameters.comment: Motor Start Failed

parameters.name: RDF
parameters.comment: Rotating Diode Failed

parameters.name: WTA
parameters.comment: Winding Temperature Alarm Protection Activated

parameters.name: WTL
parameters.comment: Winding Temperature Limit Protection Activated

parameters.name: Maximum Ambient Temp History
parameters.comment: Maximum ambient temperature of this AVR has ever exposed

parameters.name: Minutes
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: Hours
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: Days
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: Weeks
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: Years
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: Centuries
parameters.comment: Generator working time

parameters.name: RMS Voltage Set
parameters.comment: Nominal RMS Reference Voltage. Effected by UFRO LAM DROOP and Pots.

parameters.name: AVR Start
parameters.comment: AVR’s start status flag. Also can be used to manually start AVR if there is no error.

parameters.name: AVR Autostart
parameters.comment: AVR auto start setting. If enabled AVR will start as soon as there is no errors.

parameters.name: Clear Output Errors
parameters.comment: Clear error flags setting. Note: flags will automatically turn on if error continues.

parameters.name: Start Delay
parameters.comment: AVR wait time in seconds while generator starting.

parameters.name: Start Frequency
parameters.comment: AVR ramp up start frequency while generator starting. AVR will wait until sense frequency reaches this level.

parameters.name: Soft Start Time
parameters.comment: AVR ramp up time while generator starting.

parameters.name: Reference Change Ramp Limit Rate
parameters.comment: Reference Voltage limit for not causing unstable reference while using pots etc.

parameters.name: Minimum Reference Percentage
parameters.comment: Sets Minimum Reference setpoint limit percentage according to Reference RMS.

parameters.name: PID Kp
parameters.comment: Proportional coefficient of the controller. Increasing it will cause faster AVR reaction but worse steady state stability.

parameters.name: PID Ki
parameters.comment: Integral coefficient of the controller. Increasing it will cause better steady state stability but worse reaction time.

parameters.name: PID Kd
parameters.comment: Derivative coefficient of the controller. Increasing it will cause faster AVR reaction but worse steady state stability.

parameters.name: UFRO Knee Point
parameters.comment: This point will determine at what frequency AVR starts derating output voltage. It is used while taking block load.

parameters.name: DIP Rate
parameters.comment: This rate will determine how much drop will be applied to output voltage. It is used while taking block load.

parameters.name: DWELL Time
parameters.comment: This rate will determine how fast should output voltage recover after derating. Increasing it will cause faster recover time.

parameters.name: LAM Mode Selection
parameters.comment: Selection of the recover after derating mode. Should be changed according to block load performance of the system.

parameters.name: Short Circuit Threshold
parameters.comment: Short Circuit Mode Threshold. AVR will get in to the short circuit supply mode after this threshold. Attention! This Mode will disable LOS GCL and GUV. Disables after Droop Current drops below threshold.

parameters.name: AUX Input Mode
parameters.comment: Auxiliary input mode selection. AUX input will effect output voltage. In case of external pot connection this input should be disabled.

parameters.name: AUX Input Range
parameters.comment: Auxiliary input’s effect range on output voltage

parameters.name: Power Transfer Ratio
parameters.comment: 1 PU Generator Nominal Output Power. Used for J1939 Standard.

parameters.name: Current Transfer Ratio
parameters.comment: Current transfer ratio This ratio determines 1PU DROOP current on CT input.

parameters.name: DROOP Mode
parameters.comment: DROOP function determines stator current's effect on output reference voltage.

parameters.name: DROOP Phase Compensation
parameters.comment: DROOP current phase compensation. Needed if there is phase shift between current and voltage.

parameters.name: VOLTS Trimmer Effective Range
parameters.comment: VOLTS trimmer effective range on output voltage.

parameters.name: STAB Trimmer Effective Range
parameters.comment: STAB trimmer effective range on controller parameters.

parameters.name: DROOP Trimmer Effective Range
parameters.comment: DROOP trimmer effective range on output voltage.

parameters.name: External Pot Effective Range
parameters.comment: External pot effective range on output voltage.

parameters.name: Relay Normal Position
parameters.comment: Determines relay status while there are no errors

parameters.name: Reset Parameters To Defaults
parameters.comment: Reset all parameters to their defaults.

parameters.name: Canbus Source Address
parameters.comment: This AVR’s CANBus address to publish information

parameters.name: Canbus Destination Address
parameters.comment: Assigned CANBus device address to accept parameters. 0 for all

parameters.name: ADT A Input Mode
parameters.comment: ADT A input type selection. This parameter also effects related protections to selected type.

parameters.name: ADT A Temperature
parameters.comment: Temperature value of the ADT A input.

parameters.name: ADT A Value
parameters.comment: This value could be Analog Digital Temperature according to input type selection.

parameters.name: ADT B Input Mode
parameters.comment: ADT B input type selection. This parameter also effects related protections to selected type.

parameters.name: ADT B Temperature
parameters.comment: Temperature value of the ADT input.

parameters.name: ADT B Value
parameters.comment: This value could be Analog Digital Temperature according to input type selection.

parameters.name: ADT C Input Mode
parameters.comment: ADT C input type selection. This parameter also effects related protections to selected type.

parameters.name: ADT C Temperature
parameters.comment: Temperature value of the ADT input.

parameters.name: ADT C Value
parameters.comment: This value could be Analog Digital Temperature according to input type selection.

parameters.comment: Winding Temperature Limit Enable Flag

parameters.comment: Winding Temperature Limit Relay Trigger Flag

parameters.comment: Winding Temperature Limit Output Trip Flag

parameters.name: IDMT Field Mode
parameters.comment: IDMT Fuse Curve mode selection.

parameters.name: IDMT Sense Mode
parameters.comment: IDMT Fuse Curve mode selection.

parameters.name: IDMT Sense Enable
parameters.comment: IDMT Fuse Enable

parameters.name: IDMT Sense Excess
parameters.comment: IDMT Fuse Excess energy detected flag.

parameters.name: IDMT Sense Trip
parameters.comment: IDMT Fuse Tripped flag.

parameters.name: MSF Delay
parameters.comment: Motor Start Failure Delay Time

parameters.comment: MSF Protection Enable Flag

parameters.comment: Motor Start Failure Alarm Relay Trigger Flag

parameters.name: MSF Trip

parameters.comment: Rotating Diode Failure Delay Time

parameters.comment: Rotating Diode Failure Output Trip Flag

parameters.name: DEVICE_USER_PASS_ENTRY
parameters.comment: USER PASSWORD LOGIN REGISTER. RETURNS LOGIN LEVEL ON PASSWORD ENTRY

parameters.name: DEVICE_FACT_PASS_CHANGE
parameters.comment: FACTORY PASSWORD CHANGE REGISTER. REQUIRES FACTORY OR HIGHER LEVEL LOGIN FIRST

parameters.name: DEVICE_SERV_PASS_CHANGE
parameters.comment: SERVICE PASSWORD CHANGE REGISTER. REQUIRES SERVICE OR HIGHER LEVEL LOGIN FIRST

parameters.name: DEVICE_USER_PASS_CHANGE
parameters.comment: USER PASSWORD CHANGE REGISTER. REQUIRES USER OR HIGHER LEVEL LOGIN FIRST

parameters.name: DEVICE_DEF_PASS_CHANGE
parameters.comment: RETURN ALL PASSWORDS TO ENKO DEFAULTS. REQUIRES FACTORY LEVEL OR HIGHER LOGIN FIRST

parameters.name: Device BL Version
parameters.comment: Current bootloader version of the AVR.

parameters.name: Device SW Version
parameters.comment: Current software version of the AVR.

alarms.Comment: DAVR internal temperature is too high
